title: Mrbooyaa's Orange Shield Pack
description: This texture pack customizes the shield by changing both its texture and in-game size. It gives the shield a new visual style while also adjusting how large it appears when held or used, creating a cleaner and more unique PvP look.
body: This texture pack redesigns the Minecraft shield by changing both the texture and the in-game model size. The shield is smaller, cleaner, and less obstructive for PvP while still matching the vanilla style. It improves visibility during combat and gives the shield a fresh custom appearance. Fully compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11.
